message:
test(workflows): add 71 unit tests for traits, context, and plan_helpers modules

- traits.rs: 37 tests covering WorkflowStep, Workflow trait (mock impl testing
  all default methods), steps_to_plans, and WorkflowInfo::from_workflow
- context.rs: 17 tests covering PaneMetadata, WorkflowConfig, WorkflowContext
  (builder pattern, getters, plan-first execution support)
- plan_helpers.rs: 17 tests covering workflow_to_action_plan (deterministic
  hashing, validation, metadata), IdempotencyCheckResult variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
